title: EEF type-reviewer round opening
body: Opening type-reviewer round on EEF plan estate per code-reviewer recommendation and owner direction (last session). Bootstrap fast-path: active-claims.json shows no other agents present. Three pre-briefed load-bearing questions: (1) NodeProjection recursive DeepKeyPath inference at depth 4 against EefStrand; (2) EvidenceCorpus wrapping vs extends boundary preservation at call sites; (3) Citation type compile-time non-emptiness. Files in scope: graph-query-layer.plan.md (CURRENT), eef-evidence-corpus.plan.md (CURRENT), cross-source-journeys.plan.md (FUTURE). No code changes; plan-estate edits only on accepted findings.
